jobs.task: Quick health check-in with Angel. Ask: 🚶‍♀️ How many steps today? (Goal: 10,000) 💧 How much water? (Goal: 80oz / 10 glasses). Keep it to 1-2 sentences. If morning: encourage starting strong. If afternoon: give progress encouragement. If evening: encourage hitting the goal. Be warm, not preachy. Send via Telegram.

Remind Angel: Weekend to-do list! 1) 📋 Complete Broncos paperwork — don't push to Sunday. 2) 🐱 Pick up the cats! 3) 🏠 Organize the hillside garage. Block 2-3 hours for the garage. Get it all done today so Sunday is free. Send via Telegram.
Remind Angel: Weekend checklist — what's done? ☐ Broncos paperwork ☐ Pick up cats ☐ Hillside garage organized. Anything not done — do it NOW. Last day of the weekend. Send via Telegram.

Remind Angel to follow up with EUNO (Justin Tibble & Roshani Gami). They were sent a Hubble follow-up email on March 20. Check if they signed up for Ready to Raise or booked another Hubble session. If not, nudge them. Send reminder via Telegram.
Reminder: Go grocery shopping for Bronco's food TONIGHT before stores close! Don't push it to tomorrow. Send via Telegram.
